summary: Full backend + frontend end-to-end testing of FoodPlug MVP. All 29 pytest cases pass. Complete admin login → dashboard → customers add → agents add → new-rep login → POS (name search, PIN pad, visitor) → back-to-admin-sales flow verified end-to-end via Playwright against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Dashboard KPI cards (revenue, customers, agents, visitor sales), period toggles (day/month/all), month dropdown, revenue chart, top customers and recent-sales table all render and update after new sales.

issues: Recharts logs 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be > 0' warnings on initial mount because the chart container measures before layout settles. Cosmetic console noise only, chart renders correctly on the next tick.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress recharts width/height warning by setting a minHeight/minWidth on the ResponsiveContainer wrapper in DashboardPage.jsx.
(Optional) SalesAgentPage.jsx is 518 lines — approaching the 700 threshold; consider splitting the visitor form / PIN pad / customer detail into subcomponents for maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes MongoDB _id in all reads (projection {"_id": 0}) and uses async motor throughout.
Role gating is correct: /agents (GET/POST/DELETE) and DELETE /customers/{id} require admin; sales rep hits 403 as expected.
Login is case-insensitive (email.strip().lower()) and passwords are bcrypt-hashed; JWT signed HS256 with 7-day expiry.
Sale amount is enforced 100–20000 on both backend and frontend.
Auto-generated 4-digit customer PIN retries 20 times for uniqueness — fine for a small app but could theoretically fail once you approach ~9000 customers; not an issue today.
AuthContext validates the stored token via GET /auth/me on mount and clears the session on failure — good.
SalesAgentPage.jsx at 518 lines is close to the 700-line guideline; consider splitting.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@foodplug.com / admin123 ; Sales: sales@foodplug.com / sales123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md, verified working)
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 1 admin, 1 sales user, and 3 customers on startup. During tests: created TEST_ prefixed customer (deleted after), a temporary TEST_agent_<uuid> (deleted after), plus a UI-created customer, agent, and 3 sales that remain in the DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and expects pytest.ini at /app/backend/pytest.ini (uses -n 2 --dist loadscope xdist config). Public URL comes from /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All /api endpoints already covered: auth (login, me, invalid, case-insensitive), agents (list/create/delete/duplicate/non-admin 403), customers (list/create auto-pin/history/admin-only delete), sales (customer/visitor/amount bounds/list), stats (day/month/all/bad period/bad month/auth required). Playwright script order used: admin login → dashboard KPIs → period toggles → add customer → add agent → logout → agent login → POS name search sale → visitor sale → PIN pad sale → agent logout → admin re-login → sales page.
rca of the issue: No unresolved issues — MVP implementation is working end-to-end.
